response.overview: A slippery, “archival” documentary deconstructing the unlikely rise of a right-wing political strategist who began as a “leftist documentary filmmaker”. Through creative audio description, Lord re-mediates YouTube and broadcast media to probe how documentary tools become weapons in contemporary culture wars—from attacks on critical race theory, to campaigns against Black women leaders and the machinery of US mass deportation.
response.title: Concealed and Denied
